title: Conformance Report Spec v1
description: Defines what a conformance report must contain to certify that a golden path is valid. Used by the validator and any future conformance tooling.

required_fields.description: Unique identifier for this conformance report.
Identifier of the golden path being validated (e.g., 'code_change', 'mcp_tool').
The workflow class of the golden path.
Whether the golden path passes all conformance checks.

conformance_checks.description: The set of checks that must all pass for a golden path to be conformant.

checks.name: Schema Conformance
checks.description: Every artifact instance in the golden path validates against its JSON Schema.
checks.pass_condition: All artifacts pass schema validation with zero errors.
checks.fail_action: List all schema validation errors per artifact.

checks.name: Evidence Trace Completeness
checks.description: Every evidence_id referenced in BuildReport.evidence_map and VerificationArtifact.criteria_results has a corresponding evidence_record in the golden path.
checks.fail_action: List all unresolved evidence_ids and their reference location.

checks.name: Criteria Trace Completeness
checks.description: Every criteria_id in ExecutionPlan.acceptance_criteria appears in both BuildReport.evidence_map and VerificationArtifact.criteria_results.
checks.pass_condition: Zero missing criteria_ids in either the build report or verification artifact.
checks.fail_action: List criteria_ids missing from evidence_map and/or criteria_results.

checks.name: State Transition Conformance
checks.description: The golden path state_trace.transitions match the routing_policy.classes[workflow_class].normal_flow.
checks.pass_condition: State sequence extracted from transitions matches normal_flow exactly.
checks.fail_action: Show expected vs actual state sequence.

checks.name: Gate Sequence Conformance
checks.description: Gates fire at the correct states per gate-sequence.json.
checks.pass_condition: Each gate referenced in state_trace fires at its defined fires_at_state with pass routing.

checks.name: Ladder Compliance
checks.pass_condition: required_ladder matches taxonomy, executed_ladder covers required_ladder, compliant is true.

checks.name: Freshness Compliance
checks.pass_condition: If freshness_required is false, freshness_results.freshness_required is false. If true, all checks performed and all_fresh is true.

checks.name: Fail-Closed Integrity
checks.description: fail_closed_enforced is true. overall_status is pass only if all required criteria_results are pass.
checks.pass_condition: fail_closed_enforced=true AND (all required criteria pass => overall pass).
checks.fail_action: Show fail-closed violation: which required criterion is non-pass while overall is pass.

checks.name: Correlation ID Consistency
checks.description: All artifacts in the golden path share the same correlation_id.
checks.pass_condition: ResearchReport, ExecutionPlan, BuildReport, VerificationArtifact, and all evidence_records have the same correlation_id.

checks.name: Artifact Reference Chain
checks.description: ExecutionPlan.research_report_id matches ResearchReport.research_report_id. BuildReport.execution_plan_id matches ExecutionPlan.execution_plan_id. VerificationArtifact references correct plan and build report IDs.
checks.pass_condition: All cross-artifact ID references resolve correctly.

checks.name: Evidence Record Format
checks.description: Every evidence_record has all required fields per evidence-registry.json evidence_record spec.
checks.pass_condition: All evidence records have evidence_id, correlation_id, evidence_type, path, content_hash, produced_by, produced_at, size_bytes.
checks.fail_action: List evidence records with missing fields.

checks.name: Evidence Path Format
checks.description: Every evidence_record.path follows the canonical path format from evidence-registry.json.
checks.fail_action: List evidence records with non-canonical paths.

checks.name: Deterministic Artifact Hash
checks.pass_condition: artifact_hash is a non-empty hex string.

conformance_invariants.rule: A golden path cannot be conformant if any CC check fails.
Conformance checks are deterministic: same golden path always produces the same result.
Golden paths are the first e2e conformance tests. Any spec change that breaks a golden path must be resolved before merge.
